candidate_definition_hints.text: The official repo for the extension of [NeurIPS'22] "APT-36K: A Large-scale Benchmark for Animal Pose Estimation and Tracking": https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K
This repo is the official implementation of ["APTv2: Benchmarking Animal Pose Estimation and Tracking with a Large-scale Dataset and Beyond"](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2312.15612).
